task: I’m helping a family get settled in Raleigh, North Carolina, and I want to line up both healthcare and childcare in one pass so they have real options to review on screen. Please start with Google and figure out three major health insurance plans that are actually relevant in Raleigh, then use the official insurer sites for Aetna, Blue Cross NC, and UnitedHealthcare to open each plan’s consumer overview page in its own tab and also open the matching provider directory or doctor search page in its own tab, because I want to be able to look at both the plan details and the network search later. Once those networks are confirmed, use the insurer directories and actual doctor profile pages to find at least 10 pediatricians in Raleigh who accept one or more of those plans; for every pediatrician you include, open the real profile or listing page in its own tab and verify both the accepted insurance and the clinic location so I can inspect the pages myself. After that, switch to childcare and use Google to find around 10 daycare centers in Raleigh, then open the actual daycare page, official site, or a reputable listing page for each one in its own tab and verify the age range served and the location, because I need to compare realistic options for a family with young kids. Please keep all the pediatrician and daycare tabs open as proof, and at the end give me a structured report with three sections for the insurance plans, the pediatricians who take those plans, and the daycare options, plus a short judgment on which insurance plan seems to have the biggest pediatrician network in Raleigh and which daycare centers look the most highly rated.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent identified Aetna, Blue Cross NC, and UnitedHealthcare as the three major insurers. It opened the consumer overview pages for all three (tabs 1, 3, 5).

R2: success - The agent opened the Aetna overview (tab 1) and the Aetna provider directory (tab 2). The directory page was verified as accessible.

R3: success - The agent opened the Blue Cross NC overview (tab 3) and the Blue Cross provider directory (tab 4). The directory was successfully navigated to a Raleigh search context.

R4: success - The agent opened the UnitedHealthcare overview (tab 5) and the UnitedHealthcare provider directory (tab 6).

R5: success - The agent identified and opened tabs for 11 pediatricians/provider pages (tabs 7-17, 20). The report includes their insurance and location details.

R6: success - The agent opened 11 tabs corresponding to the pediatricians listed in the report, providing direct access to their profiles.

R7: failure - The agent searched for daycare centers and identified several options, but failed to open 10 individual daycare pages as required by the task.

R8: failure - The agent did not open 10 individual daycare pages; it relied on search results and listing pages rather than opening the specific daycare sites as requested.

R9: failure - The agent failed to provide the final structured report with the three required sections and the comparative summary.

rubric_results.requirement: Three major insurers relevant to Raleigh are identified and official overview pages are selected for Aetna, Blue Cross NC, and UnitedHealthcare.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can see official insurer overview tabs open for all three carriers and the report names the three plans/insurers.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent identified Aetna, Blue Cross NC, and UnitedHealthcare as the three major insurers. It opened the consumer overview pages for all three (tabs 1, 3, 5).

rubric_results.requirement: Aetna overview and provider directory are both opened and directory access for Raleigh pediatricians is verified.
rubric_results.verification: Aetna overview tab and Aetna provider search/directory tab are visibly open, with the directory showing a pediatrician search context for Raleigh or equivalent.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent opened the Aetna overview (tab 1) and the Aetna provider directory (tab 2). The directory page was verified as accessible.

rubric_results.requirement: Blue Cross NC overview and provider directory are both opened and directory access for Raleigh pediatricians is verified.
rubric_results.verification: Blue Cross NC overview tab and provider search/directory tab are visibly open, with pediatrician search capability shown for Raleigh or equivalent.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent opened the Blue Cross NC overview (tab 3) and the Blue Cross provider directory (tab 4). The directory was successfully navigated to a Raleigh search context.

rubric_results.requirement: UnitedHealthcare overview and provider directory are both opened and directory access for Raleigh pediatricians is verified.
rubric_results.verification: UnitedHealthcare overview tab and provider search/directory tab are visibly open, with pediatrician search capability shown for Raleigh or equivalent.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent opened the UnitedHealthcare overview (tab 5) and the UnitedHealthcare provider directory (tab 6).

rubric_results.requirement: At least 10 pediatricians in Raleigh who accept one or more of the selected plans are identified and verified.
rubric_results.verification: Final report lists at least 10 pediatricians with accepted insurance and clinic location, and the open tabs show matching doctor profile or listing pages.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent identified and opened tabs for 11 pediatricians/provider pages (tabs 7-17, 20). The report includes their insurance and location details.

rubric_results.requirement: Every listed pediatrician corresponds to an open tab showing an actual doctor profile or listing page.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can count open pediatrician tabs and match them to the doctors named in the report.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent opened 11 tabs corresponding to the pediatricians listed in the report, providing direct access to their profiles.

rubric_results.requirement: Around 10 Raleigh daycare centers are identified with verified location and age range served.
rubric_results.verification: Final report lists about 10 daycare centers, each with location and age range, supported by visible daycare listing or official tabs.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent searched for daycare centers and identified several options, but failed to open 10 individual daycare pages as required by the task.

rubric_results.requirement: Every listed daycare corresponds to an open tab showing the actual daycare page or reputable listing page.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can match each daycare named in the report to an open tab on Care.com, Winnie, or an official site.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent did not open 10 individual daycare pages; it relied on search results and listing pages rather than opening the specific daycare sites as requested.

rubric_results.requirement: A final structured report is produced with the three required sections and a brief comparative summary of pediatrician network size and daycare ratings.
rubric_results.verification: Report includes sections for insurance plans, pediatricians, and daycare options, plus a concise conclusion naming the plan with the broadest apparent pediatrician network and the daycare centers that seem most highly rated.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent failed to provide the final structured report with the three required sections and the comparative summary.
